scenarios.title: Computer Vision Modeling and Augmentation
scenarios.when_to_read: Image augmentation, PIL/Pillow operations, vision datasets/transforms, classification and detection models, segmentation, YOLO/SAM/OpenMMLab workflows, and model export.
scenarios.role: Use Meta Segment Anything (SAM) for prompt-based segmentation, automatic mask generation, ONNX export, browser deployment, checkpoints, optional dependencies, and troubleshooting.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `segment-anything` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: automatic mask generation, onnx and browser, and prompted segmentation.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `segment-anything` when the request names `segment-anything`, centers on prompt-based segmentation, automatic mask generation, ONNX export, browser deployment, checkpoints, optional dependencies, and troubleshooting, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in computer vision modeling and augmentation. Then route to automatic mask generation, onnx and browser, or prompted segmentation when those focused workflows match.
